ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, completed, canceled) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the order */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the order */,
  "installment_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installment plan associated with the order */,
  "fraud_score" REAL /* A score indicating the likelihood of fraud for the order */,
  "fraud_status" TEXT /* Status of fraud checks (e.g., pending, flagged, cleared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_types ("payment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_installment_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("installment_plan_id") REFERENCES installment_plans ("installment_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* ID of the order associated with the payment */,
  "payment_sequential" INTEGER /* Sequential number of the payment (e.g., 1 for the first payment) */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., credit_card, bank_transfer) */,
  "payment_installments" INTEGER /* Number of installments for the payment */,
  "payment_value" REAL /* Value of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address for the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used for the payment */,
  "installment_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installment plan associated with the payment */,
  "fraud_score" REAL /* A score indicating the likelihood of fraud for the payment */,
  "fraud_status" TEXT /* Status of fraud checks (e.g., pending, flagged, cleared) */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* A reference number for the payment, useful for reconciliation */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method (e.g., card type, bank name) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_types ("payment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_installment_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("installment_plan_id") REFERENCES installment_plans ("installment_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the customer account was last updated */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the customer */,
  "preferred_installment_plan" TEXT /* Preferred installment plan of the customer */,
  "is_fraud_risk" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is a high fraud risk */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment made by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "payment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type (e.g., credit_card, bank_transfer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment type is a default option */,
  "is_installment_supported" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment type supports installment plans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., US Dollar, Euro) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency against a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the exchange rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fraud_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fraud flag */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment transaction associated with the flag */,
  "flag_type" TEXT /* Type of fraud flag (e.g., high_risk, suspicious_activity) */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fraud flag */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* Date the fraud flag was raised */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fraud flag has been resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution of the fraud flag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fraud_flags_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_histories" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment history record */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment transaction associated with the history */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "previous_status" TEXT /* Previous status of the payment */,
  "new_status" TEXT /* New status of the payment */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* Previous value of the payment */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the payment */,
  "is_fraudulent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change was related to a fraud investigation */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the resolution of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_histories_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, support) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date when the user last changed their password */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_gateway_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment transaction associated with the gateway transaction */,
  "gateway_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment gateway (e.g., Stripe, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was processed */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "response_code" TEXT /* Response code from the payment gateway */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Response message from the payment gateway */,
  "is_fraudulent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is flagged as fraudulent */,
  "fraud_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the fraud flag */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method (e.g., card type, bank name) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_gateway_transactions_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installment_plans" (
  "installment_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the installment plan */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the installment plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the installment plan */,
  "number_of_installments" INTEGER /* Number of installments in the plan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the installment plan */,
  "minimum_amount" REAL /* Minimum amount required to use the installment plan */,
  "maximum_amount" REAL /* Maximum amount allowed for the installment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installment_plan_id")
)
